meanings.usage: 常与 at 或 on 搭配使用，表示敲门或敲窗等动作
指早餐、午餐或晚餐等正餐
常用 glass of 表示几杯，如 a glass of beer
常用作不可数名词，一杯啤酒为 a glass of beer
常用于 in return (for) 短语，意为作为（...的）回报
stand on one's head 意为倒立，用头撑地
stand on one's head 是固定表达，意为倒立
指唱的歌或歌曲，可数名词
奶酪是不可数名词，一块奶酪为 a piece of cheese
指衣服上的口袋，put something in one's pocket 放入某人口袋
指住在附近的人，美式拼写为 neighbor
表示时间长度，once a month 每月一次
call at 表示访问某个地方，call on 表示拜访某人
move to somewhere 表示搬到某个地方

phrases.usage: 敲门，表示有人来访时敲门的动作

examples.en: Yesterday a beggar knocked at my door.
examples.zh: 昨天一个乞丐敲了我的门。

phrases.usage: 请求；要求，表示向他人要某物或做某事

examples.en: He asked me for a meal and a glass of beer.
examples.zh: 他向我要一顿饭和一杯啤酒。

phrases.usage: 作为（...的）回报，常用于表示交换或报答

examples.en: In return for this, the beggar stood on his head and sang songs.
examples.zh: 作为回报，乞丐倒立并唱歌。

phrases.usage: 倒立，用头撑地倒立的姿势

examples.en: The beggar stood on his head.
He put a piece of cheese in his pocket.
examples.zh: 他把一块奶酪放进了口袋。

phrases.usage: 离开，走开，表示离开某个地方

examples.en: Then he put a piece of cheese in his pocket and went away.
examples.zh: 然后他把一块奶酪放进口袋就走了。

phrases.usage: 拜访（某地），访问某个具体地点

examples.en: He calls at every house in the street once a month.
examples.zh: 他每月来这条街的每户人家拜访一次。

phrases.usage: 每月一次，表示频率的固定搭配

examples.en: He calls at every house once a month.
examples.zh: 他每月拜访每户人家一次。

examples.en: Later a neighbour told me about him.
examples.zh: 后来一个邻居告诉了我关于他的事。

phrases.usage: 搬到（某地），搬迁到新地方

examples.en: I have just moved to a house in Bridge Street.
examples.zh: 我刚搬到布里奇街的一栋房子里。

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Simple Past Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某个特定时间发生的动作或存在的状态，常与 yesterday, last week, ago 等时间状语连用
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去发生的事情，动词需要变成过去式

examples.en: Yesterday a beggar knocked at my door.
examples.zh: 昨天一个乞丐敲了我的门。

examples.en: He asked me for a meal and a glass of beer.
examples.zh: 他向我要一顿饭和一杯啤酒。

examples.en: He ate the food and drank the beer.
examples.zh: 他吃了食物并喝了啤酒。

grammar.title: 一般过去时的否定句和疑问句
grammar.definition: 使用 did + 动词原形构成否定句和一般疑问句
grammar.structure: 否定句：主语 + did not (didn't) + 动词原形；疑问句：Did + 主语 + 动词原形？
grammar.usage: 当句中有实义动词的过去式时，否定句和疑问句需要借助 did

examples.en: Did he ask for a meal?

grammar.title: 一般现在时 (Simple Present Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示经常性或习惯性的动作，以及客观事实和普遍真理
grammar.structure: 主语 + 动词原形/第三人称单数形式
grammar.usage: 描述习惯性行为、普遍真理或当前的状态

examples.en: He calls at every house in the street once a month.
examples.zh: 他每月来这条街的每户人家拜访一次。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + have/has just + 过去分词

original.en: I have just moved to a house in Bridge Street.
original.zh: 我刚搬到布里奇街的一栋房子里。

imitations.en: She has just arrived at the station.
They have just finished their homework.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + asked me for + 名词

original.en: He asked me for a meal and a glass of beer.
original.zh: 他向我要一顿饭和一杯啤酒。

imitations.en: The student asked the teacher for help.
imitations.zh: 那个学生向老师寻求帮助。

imitations.en: She asked me for some water.

sentencePatterns.pattern: In return for this, 主语 + 动词过去式 + ...

original.en: In return for this, the beggar stood on his head and sang songs.
original.zh: 作为回报，那个乞丐倒立并唱歌。

imitations.en: In return for her kindness, I bought her a gift.
imitations.zh: 作为对她好意的回报，我给她买了一份礼物。

imitations.en: In return for this, he gave me his address.
imitations.zh: 作为回报，他给了我他的地址。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + calls at every + 名词 + 时间频率

original.en: He calls at every house in the street once a month.
original.zh: 他每月来这条街的每户人家拜访一次。

imitations.en: The postman calls at every building once a day.
imitations.zh: 邮递员每天来每栋楼一次。

imitations.en: She calls at every shop on this street once a week.
imitations.zh: 她每周来这条街的每家商店一次。
